tasks.label: Check GH CLI
args: if (Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { gh --version } else { Write-Output GH_NOT_FOUND }

tasks.label: Install GH CLI (zip)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $repo='https://api.github.com/repos/cli/cli/releases/latest'; $release=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $repo -Headers @{ 'User-Agent'='PowerShell' }; $asset=$release.assets | Where-Object { $_.name -match 'windows_amd64.zip$' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $asset) { throw 'No windows_amd64.zip asset found' }; $toolsDir=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'tools'; $installRoot=Join-Path $toolsDir 'gh-cli'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $toolsDir | Out-Null; if (Test-Path $installRoot) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $installRoot }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $installRoot | Out-Null; $zipPath=Join-Path $toolsDir $asset.name; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $asset.browser_download_url -OutFile $zipPath -UseBasicParsing; Expand-Archive -Path $zipPath -DestinationPath $installRoot -Force; $ghExe = Get-ChildItem -Path $installRoot -Recurse -Filter gh.exe | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $ghExe) { throw 'gh.exe not found after extraction' }; $ghBin = Split-Path $ghExe.FullName -Parent; $userPath=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','User'); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($userPath)) { $userPath='' }; $parts=$userPath.Split(';',[System.StringSplitOptions]::RemoveEmptyEntries); if ($parts -notcontains $ghBin) { $newPath = (($parts + $ghBin) -join ';').Trim(';'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path',$newPath,'User') }; Write-Output ('GH_BIN=' + $ghBin); & $ghExe.FullName --version

tasks.label: Verify GH CLI
args: $ghExe = Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'tools\gh-cli') -Recurse -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($ghExe) { Write-Output ('FOUND=' + $ghExe.FullName); & $ghExe.FullName --version } else { Write-Output GH_EXE_NOT_FOUND }

tasks.label: GH Login Web
args: gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web --scopes repo,read:org

tasks.label: GH Auth Check Reliable
args: $gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $gh) { $gh = Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'tools\gh-cli') -Recurse -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 }; if (-not $gh) { throw 'gh non trovato' }; & $gh.Source auth status --hostname github.com; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: Check MSI GH Path
args: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe') { Write-Output 'GH_MSI_OK'; & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' --version } elseif (Test-Path (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\GitHub CLI\gh.exe')) { $p = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\GitHub CLI\gh.exe'; Write-Output 'GH_USER_OK'; & $p --version } else { Write-Output 'GH_MSI_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: Check JDK Candidates
args: $candidates = @('C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr','C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jre','C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium','C:\Program Files\Java'); foreach ($p in $candidates) { Write-Output ($p + ' => ' + (Test-Path $p)) }

tasks.label: Find Alternative JDK
args: $candidates=@('C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr','C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jre','D:\Android\Android Studio\jbr','D:\Android\android-studio\jbr'); $found=$false; foreach($p in $candidates){ if(Test-Path $p){ $found=$true; Write-Output ('FOUND ' + $p); if(Test-Path (Join-Path $p 'bin\java.exe')){ & (Join-Path $p 'bin\java.exe') -version } } }; if(-not $found){ Write-Output 'NO_ALT_JDK_FOUND' }

tasks.label: Check Debug APK Timestamp
args: $p='app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; if(Test-Path $p){ Get-Item $p | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output 'APK_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: Check APK Freshness Now
args: $p='app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; if(Test-Path $p){ Get-Item $p | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-List } else { Write-Output 'APK_NOT_FOUND' }
